name: FortiGate IPS Events
description: Detects intrusion attempts as reported by the FortiGate Intrusion Prevention System (IPS).

prompts.prompt: An Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) event has been reported by FortiGate, indicating a detected intrusion attempt. This is a high-risk security alert. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **User** {user}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **Source Country** {source_country}, **Destination Country** {destination_country}, **IPS Signature** {sig_name}, **Severity** {severity}, **Action** {action}. Investigate this critical intrusion attempt immediately to determine its nature and potential impact.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the IPS event.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate Log ID for the IPS event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user associated with the event, if available.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the intrusion attempt.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the intrusion attempt.

parameters.name: source_country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the source IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: destination_country
parameters.description: The country of the destination IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: sig_name
parameters.description: The name of the IPS signature that detected the intrusion.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: The severity level of the IPS alert.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action taken by the IPS (e.g., 'blocked', 'allowed', 'detected').
